anonymize.burnedInPhiBlocked: Anonymized export disabled for {modality}: this modality often has patient identifiers burned into image pixels (text overlays). DICOM tag-level anonymization (Supplement 142 Basic Profile) does not remove pixel-burned PHI.

anonymize.pixelPhiWarning: WARNING: This removes DICOM tag PHI (patient name, MRN, dates, etc.) but does NOT remove text or identifiers burned into image pixels. Continue?
